SqlAuthenticationProviderException.summary: Represents an error that occurs during the authentication process.

ctor1.summary:
Protected construction for derived classes to supply a minimal set of values.
Action will be "Unknown". FailureCode will be "Unknown". ShouldRetry will be false. RetryPeriod will be 0.
ctor1.param: The exception that caused this exception, if any.

ctor2.summary: Protected construction for derived classes to supply values for all public properties.
ctor2.param: The name of the authentication action that failed, or "Unknown" if not known.
The failure code, or "Unknown" if not known.
True if the action should be retried, false otherwise.
The period of time, in milliseconds, to wait before retrying the action. Never negative. Undefined if ShouldRetry is false.
The exception that caused this exception, if any.

Action.summary: The name of the authentication action that failed, or "Unknown" if not known.

FailureCode.summary: The failure code, or "Unknown" if not known.

ShouldRetry.summary: True if the action should be retried, false otherwise.

RetryPeriod.summary: The period of time, in milliseconds, to wait before retrying the action. Never negative. Undefined if ShouldRetry is false.
